commands.repair_reason: The remaining blocker is maintainer product/security judgment on whether OpenClaw should own Helm and what credential model is acceptable before any automated repair work.; Needs attention: The chart needs security review because the default install path routes long-lived operator credentials through Helm values.; Review finding: [P1] Trigger rollouts for chart config and secret changes — charts/openclaw/templates/d... (sha=11acdc4437b7d307992bcb0046b4939539c769b1)
commands.review_summary:
The branch adds a values-driven Helm chart under charts/openclaw/ for deploying the OpenClaw gateway on Kubernetes alongside the existing raw Kustomize manifests.

Reproducibility: yes. Source inspection of the PR chart is enough to reproduce the review defects: config/secret changes do not alter the pod template, service.port diverges from config.openclawJson, secret.create=false can render a missing required Secret reference, and the default RWO PVC conflicts with replicaCount > 1.
commands.review_followup: The remaining blocker is maintainer product/security judgment on whether OpenClaw should own Helm and what credential model is acceptable before any automated repair work.

target.title: feat(deploy): add Helm chart for OpenClaw (equivalent to existing k8s manifests)
target.author: pidstat
